name: Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can hot chili beans in sauce, 16 oz
1 pound Bob Evans Hot Pork Sausage, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain all canned beans.
2. In a large bowl, combine the drained beans, tomato paste, tomato soup, chopped onions, brown sugar, and mustard.
3. Add the cooked and drained pork sausage to the mixture.
4. Stir thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
5. Transfer the mixture into a 4-quart casserole dish.
6. Cover with foil and refrigerate overnight.
7. Before baking, preheat the oven to 325°F (165°C).
8. Bake for 90 minutes, or until heated through and thoroughly cooked.
